title: Virtuoso 42000 Error GBJON: Partitioned hash table must be of the chash type
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_partitioned (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_partitioned (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test A', 10.5), (2, 'Test B', NULL), (3, 'Test C', 20.0);
CREATE TABLE test_class_partition (class_id INT, class_name VARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY (class_id) REFERENCES test_partitioned(id));
INSERT INTO test_class_partition (class_id, class_name) SELECT id, name FROM test_partitioned WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT cp.class_name, COUNT(tp.value) AS value_count FROM test_class_partition cp JOIN test_partitioned tp ON cp.class_id = tp.id GROUP BY cp.class_name;
key_bug_features: Partitioned hash table must be of the chash type
